markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the Vercel partnership scope and commercial terms.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Commercials Approved:** The deal is now a 12-month contract with a ramped monthly fee: $20k for the first 6 months, then $30k for the final 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Procurement Path Defined:** Cody will sign the SoW as a letter of intent to start the formal procurement process via Zip, which includes legal review.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [**Kickoff Date Set:** The official project kickoff is confirmed for **February 23rd**, allowing time for procurement and GrowthX's pre-work.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Initial Scope:** Content will launch on the `/i` index to bypass high-level approvals. GrowthX will also partner on Vercel's LLM visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

## Topics

### Commercials & Procurement

  - [**Problem:** The original SoW's $40k upfront fee and 6-month term conflicted with Vercel's budget and GrowthX's need for ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**Solution:** A single 12-month contract with a ramped monthly fee.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Months 1–6:** $20k/month (discounted to align with Vercel's current agency spend).](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Months 7–12:** $30k/month (full scope).](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Procurement Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
    1.  [Cody signs the SoW as a letter of intent.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
    2.  [Cody submits the SoW to Vercel's Zip platform.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
    3.  [Zip manages the formal vendor onboarding and legal review (MSA redlines).](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Cody will confirm the estimated duration of the Zip process.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)

### Project Scope & Strategy

  - [**Initial Publishing Path:** Content will launch on the `/i` index, a copy of the blog with a flexible content model.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Bypasses the high-level approval required for the main blog and product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Requirements:** A dedicated sitemap and footer links are needed to ensure proper indexation.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [**Growth Levers:**](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [**AI Gateway:** Optimize for model-specific traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [**Guides:** Target long-tail, buyer-intent questions.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [**"Stacks" Pages:** Use programmatic SEO for new pages launching soon.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [**Future Opportunity:** Create a high-value "AI chat" tool combining the AI SDK and Gateway.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [**Strategic Partnership:** GrowthX will provide feedback and engineering resources for Vercel's LLM visibility tool, which will be open-sourced.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

### Kickoff & Pre-Work

  - [**Kickoff Date:** Confirmed for **February 23rd**.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Allows time for procurement and GrowthX's pre-kickoff research.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Data Access:** GrowthX needs view-only access to:](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [**Amplitude:** Vercel's primary analytics tool (data via Rudderstack CDP).](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Google Search Console (GSC):** For search performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Internal Stakeholders:** Cody identified key contacts for early interviews to map the buyer journey and internal politics:](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Dan Fine (Product Marketing):** "Extension of G's brain," critical for understanding the CMO's vision.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Eric Dodds (Product Marketing):** Another key resource.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [**Head of PR:** Shaping the 5-year brand narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
      - [Send updated SoW (12-month, ramped fee) to Cody within 1.5 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
      - [Initiate legal review of the MSA upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
      - [Submit the updated SoW to Zip to start the procurement process.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [Confirm the estimated timeline for the Zip process.](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [Introduce GrowthX to key internal stakeholders (Dan Fine, Eric Dodds, Head of PR).](https://fathom.video/share/rn4WVgB1bR4Xjsap2yamPHwxWnbyP632?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
